features: Luxury 250ml bath bubbles and 120g bath bomb for the perfect bath time
Luxury 100ml body scrub and 250ml body lotion leaving your skin beautifully soft and cared for
Baylis & Harding's iconic Sweet Mandarin & Grapefruit fragrance
Beautiful keepsake box with recyclable wrap band
description: Product Description Bathtimes have never felt or smelt better with this luxury bathing gift set containing 250ml bath bubbles, 250ml body lotion, 120g bath bomb and 100ml body scrub. The perfect gift to treat someone special. Art deco design meets timeless luxury with our enduring Sweet Mandarin & Grapefruit collection. Our most iconic fragrance, composed with beautiful jasmine and layered with sparkling citrus top notes brings a luxe dimension to this classic assortment. An elegant monochrome palette coupled with a geometric print masterfully accented with gold foil accents, perfectly finesses this seasonal collection. Timeless, always understated and elegant; Sweet Mandarin & Grapefruit is our most iconic and best-selling fragrance. Enduring in its appeal, its subtle fragrance, a blend of jasmine and orange with sparkling top notes of sweet mandarin, grapefruit and lemon. Ingredients BATH BUBBLES: Aqua (Water, Eau), Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Sodium Chloride, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Phenoxyethanol, Peg-150 Distearate, Parfum (Fragrance), Sodium Benzoate, Potassium Sorbate, Disodium Edta, Citric Acid, Benzophenone-4, Citrus Aurantium Peel Oil, Limonene, Linalool, Tetramethyl Acetyloctahydronaphthalenes, Ci 19140 (Yellow 5), Ci 16035 (Red 40).BODY LOTION: Aqua (Water, Eau), Cetearyl Alcohol, Paraffinum Liquidum (Mineral Oil), Stearic Acid, Glyceryl Stearate, Glycerin, Peg-100 Stearate, Phenoxyethanol, Caprylyl Glycol, Carbomer, Parfum (Fragrance), Sodium Hydroxide, Benzophenone-4, Citral, Citrus Aurantium Peel Oil, Citrus Limon Peel Oil Oil, Eugenol, Limonene, Linalool, Linalyl Acetate, Pinene, Tetramethyl Acetyloctahydronaphthalenes.BATH BOMBS: Sodium Bicarbonate, Citric Acid, Sodium Sulfate, Glycerin, Parfum (Fragrance), Citrus Aurantium Peel Oil, Limonene, Linalool, Linalyl Acetate, Tetramethyl Acetyloctahydronaphthalenes.BODY SCRUB: Aqua (Water, Eau), Peg-40 Hydrogenated Castor Oil, Microcrystalline Cellulose, Carbomer, Phenoxyethanol, Parfum (Fragrance), Chlorphenesin, Benzyl Alcohol, Sodium Hydroxide, Citrus Aurantium Peel Oil, Limonene, Linalool, Tetramethyl Acetyloctahydronaphthalenes. Directions Bath Bubbles - Pour Into Bath Under Warm Running Water. Body Lotion - Massage Gently Into Skin Until Fully Absorbed. Bath Bomb - Drop Bath Bomb Into Water To Dissolve. Body Scrub -Massage Gently Into Skin And Rinse. Safety Warning WARNING: AVOID CONTACT WITH EYES. IF PRODUCT GETS IN THE EYES RINSE IMMEDIATELY WITH CLEAN WARM WATER. IF SKIN IRRITATION OCCURS DISCONTINUE USE. IF IRRITATION PERSISTS CONSULT YOUR DOCTOR. Manufacturer Contact Information Baylis & Harding Plc, B98 7AS, England. RP. MSL, Suite 5385, 27 Upper Pembroke St, Dublin, IE. See more
